sentences.sentence: Driverless cars may be set to become reality.
sentences.translation: 无人驾驶汽车或许即将成为现实。

structure.text: may be set to become reality

difficult_points: may 表示可能性，说明这一判断仍非确定事实。
be set to do 表示某事很可能即将发生，并非字面上的“被设置”。

sentences.sentence: At least that is, if the executives behind the taxi app, Uber, are to be believed.
sentences.translation: 至少，如果出租车应用优步背后的高管所言可信，情况就是如此。

structure.text: if the executives behind the taxi app, Uber, are to be believed

difficult_points: that 指代上一句“无人驾驶汽车即将成为现实”这一判断。
if ... are to be believed 是固定的条件表达，意为如果这些人的话可信；Uber 是 taxi app 的同位语。

sentences.sentence: Currently, Uber is taking its biggest steps yet towards a driver-free world, launching the Uber Advanced Technologies Centre in Pittsburgh.
sentences.translation: 目前，优步正在为迈向无人驾驶世界采取迄今最重大的行动：在匹兹堡成立优步先进技术中心。

structure.text: is taking its biggest steps yet towards a driver-free world
launching the Uber Advanced Technologies Centre in Pittsburgh

difficult_points: yet 与最高级 biggest 连用，表示截至目前最重大的。
launching... 是现在分词状语，具体说明优步所采取的重大行动。

sentences.sentence: The ultimate goal of this institution is to 'do research and development, primarily in the areas of mapping and vehicle safety and autonomy technology'.
sentences.translation: 该机构的最终目标是“开展研发工作，主要涉及地图绘制、车辆安全和自动驾驶技术领域”。

structure.text: The ultimate goal of this institution
is to 'do research and development, primarily in the areas of mapping and vehicle safety and autonomy technology'
primarily in the areas of mapping and vehicle safety and autonomy technology

difficult_points: to do... 是不定式作表语，解释该机构的最终目标。
primarily... 限定研发工作的重点领域；原文用单引号标出机构目标。

sentences.sentence: To date, Uber has provided a chauffeur-driven taxi service for American clients.
sentences.translation: 截至目前，优步一直为美国客户提供由专职司机驾驶的出租车服务。

structure.text: has provided a chauffeur-driven taxi service for American clients

difficult_points: To date 表示截至目前，与现在完成时 has provided 呼应。
chauffeur-driven 是过去分词复合形容词，表示由专职司机驾驶。

sentences.sentence: Venturing into the realms of driverless cars is therefore a new direction which will require massive investment.
sentences.translation: 因此，进军无人驾驶汽车领域是一个需要巨额投资的新方向。

structure.text: Venturing into the realms of driverless cars

difficult_points: Venturing... 是动名词短语作主语，表示进入一个新领域这件事。
which 引导定语从句修饰 a new direction，说明该方向所需投入。

sentences.sentence: It is indeed a huge leap of faith on Uber's part, since technology has yet to catch up with the idea of a fully autonomous vehicle.
sentences.translation: 这对优步而言确实是一次基于信念的巨大冒险，因为现有技术还没有赶上完全自动驾驶汽车这一构想。

structure.text: It is indeed a huge leap of faith on Uber's part
since technology has yet to catch up with the idea of a fully autonomous vehicle

difficult_points: It 指代优步进军无人驾驶汽车领域这件事；on Uber's part 表示从优步这一方来看。
has yet to do 表示尚未做成；since 在此引导原因状语从句。

sentences.sentence: On the as well as stay in lane, and maintain a steady cruising seed.
sentences.translation: （原文此句严重残缺）……以及保持在车道内，并维持稳定的巡航速度。

structure.text: as well as stay in lane
and maintain a steady cruising seed

difficult_points: 源句从 On the 后明显缺失内容，无法恢复完整主干，翻译仅呈现仍可辨认的信息。
cruising seed 是源文拼写异常，按语境应为 cruising speed（巡航速度），原句按源文保留。

expressions.meaning_zh: 保持稳定巡航速度（按语境还原的积累形式）

sentences.sentence: In a patchwork fashion such cars could eventually build up to almost full automation and Uber believes that car owners will readily embrace the idea of driverless taxis.
sentences.translation: 通过逐项拼合功能，这类汽车最终可能接近完全自动化；优步相信，车主会欣然接受无人驾驶出租车的概念。

structure.text: such cars could eventually build up to almost full automation
that car owners will readily embrace the idea of driverless taxis

difficult_points: In a patchwork fashion 表示通过把不同功能逐步拼合起来，而非一次完成。
that 引导 believes 的宾语从句；readily 表示乐意、毫不迟疑地接受。

sentences.sentence: In Uber's eyes, current car owners only stand to gain by the introduction of such technology.
sentences.translation: 在优步看来，现有车主只会从这项技术的引入中获益。

structure.text: only stand to gain by the introduction of such technology

difficult_points: In Uber's eyes 限定本句只是优步方面的观点。
stand to gain 表示很可能获得利益；by 引出获益所凭借的变化。

sentences.sentence: Hiring a driverless cab means that the client does not have to pay for the cost of the driver in the cab fee.
sentences.translation: 乘坐无人驾驶出租车意味着，客户不必在车费中承担司机的成本。

structure.text: that the client does not have to pay for the cost of the driver in the cab fee

difficult_points: Hiring... 是动名词短语作主语，这里指雇用或乘坐无人驾驶出租车。
that 从句作 means 的宾语；in the cab fee 表示司机成本原本包含在车费之中。

sentences.sentence: The only cost incurred by clients is for fuel, plus wear and tear.
sentences.translation: 客户需要承担的成本只有燃料费，外加车辆正常损耗。

structure.text: The only cost incurred by clients
is for fuel, plus wear and tear

difficult_points: incurred by clients 是过去分词短语，修饰 cost，表示由客户承担的。
wear and tear 是固定搭配，指正常使用造成的磨损，而不是两个独立费用项目。

sentences.sentence: It is certainly an attractive proposition.
sentences.translation: 这无疑是一个很有吸引力的提议。
difficult_points: It 指代前文所述无人驾驶出租车能降低客户费用这一方案。
proposition 在此指可供考虑的主张或方案，不是语法中的命题。

sentences.sentence: Uber stands to benefit, too, since employees currently working as taxi drivers will be removed from the company's payroll.
sentences.translation: 优步也很可能从中获益，因为目前担任出租车司机的员工将不再列入公司的工资名册。

structure.text: since employees currently working as taxi drivers will be removed from the company's payroll

difficult_points: since 引导原因状语从句，解释优步获益的方式。
working... 修饰 employees；be removed from the payroll 委婉表示公司不再支付这些司机的工资。

sentences.sentence: Apparently for car drivers and Uber, it is a win-win situation.
sentences.translation: 显然，对乘客和优步而言，这似乎是一个双赢局面。
difficult_points: it 指无人驾驶出租车的引入；for... 指明被认为获益的双方。
car drivers 在上下文中用词略含混，可能指乘车者或驾驶者，翻译结合费用讨论处理为乘客。

sentences.sentence: Not everyone will benefit however from this technology, the car industry being an obvious example.
sentences.translation: 然而，并非所有人都会从这项技术中受益，汽车行业就是一个明显的例子。

structure.text: will benefit however from this technology
the car industry being an obvious example

difficult_points: Not everyone 是部分否定，表示并非人人都受益，而不是所有人都不受益。
the car industry being... 是独立主格结构，补充一个不受益的例子。

sentences.sentence: Not surprisingly, the industry views the concept of selt-driving cars with a sense of growing alarm.
sentences.translation: 不出所料，汽车行业对自动驾驶汽车这一概念感到日益忧虑。

structure.text: views the concept of selt-driving cars with a sense of growing alarm

difficult_points: view A with B 表示以某种态度看待某事，with 后是行业的情绪。
selt-driving 是源文拼写错误，按语境应为 self-driving，原句按源文保留。

sentences.sentence: Such technology could well prove the death knell for private car ownership.
sentences.translation: 这项技术很可能最终敲响私人汽车所有制的丧钟。

structure.text: could well prove the death knell for private car ownership

difficult_points: could well 表示很可能，well 在此加强可能性。
prove 在此意为结果证明是；death knell 是比喻，指某事物走向终结的信号。

sentences.sentence: As a result, the industry is dragging its feet over the manufacture and introduction of fully automated vehicles onto the market, due to commercial issues.
sentences.translation: 因此，出于商业利益方面的顾虑，汽车行业一直拖延全自动汽车的制造及市场投放。

structure.text: is dragging its feet over the manufacture and introduction of fully automated vehicles onto the market

difficult_points: drag one's feet over 是比喻表达，指故意拖延、不积极推进。
due to... 给出行业拖延的商业原因；onto the market 与 introduction 搭配，表示推向市场。

sentences.sentence: The commercial aspect apart, there is also the safety issue.
sentences.translation: 撇开商业层面不谈，还存在安全问题。

structure.text: there is also the safety issue

difficult_points: The commercial aspect apart 是独立结构，相当于 apart from the commercial aspect。
there is 是存在句，将讨论重点从商业问题转向安全问题。

sentences.sentence: Whilst a fully automated car could respond to most eventualities in the course of a trip, would it be capable of responding to unforeseen events, such as changes in route or unexpected diversions?
sentences.translation: 虽然全自动汽车或许能应对行程中的大多数情况，但它能否处理路线变化或临时改道等意外事件呢？

structure.text: Whilst a fully automated car could respond to most eventualities in the course of a trip
would it be capable of responding to unforeseen events
such as changes in route or unexpected diversions

difficult_points: Whilst 引导让步状语从句，主句以疑问倒装形式提出质疑。
eventualities 指可能出现的各种情况；such as 后列举 unforeseen events 的例子。

sentences.sentence: Evidently legislative authorities are also of this opinion.
sentences.translation: 显然，立法机构也持这种看法。
difficult_points: this opinion 指上一句对全自动汽车处理突发事件能力的担忧。
be of an opinion 是较正式的表达，相当于 hold an opinion。

sentences.sentence: Currently, no matter how much automation a car has, it still requires a driver with a full licence behind the wheel to drive on public roads.
sentences.translation: 目前，无论一辆汽车的自动化程度有多高，要在公共道路上行驶，仍必须有一名持完整驾照的司机坐在驾驶位上。

structure.text: no matter how much automation a car has
still requires a driver with a full licence behind the wheel

difficult_points: no matter how much... 引导让步状语从句，表示自动化程度再高也不例外。
it 指 a car；behind the wheel 表示坐在驾驶位负责驾驶，to drive... 说明适用情境。

sentences.sentence: Whilst robot drivers, on the whole, have the upper hand on their human counterparts safety-wise, that still does not guarantee that they will become legal.
sentences.translation: 尽管总体而言，机器人司机在安全性方面胜过人类司机，但这仍不能保证它们会获得合法地位。

structure.text: Whilst robot drivers, on the whole, have the upper hand on their human counterparts safety-wise

difficult_points: Whilst 引导让步从句；have the upper hand on 表示相较人类司机占优势。
主句 that 指机器人司机更安全这一事实；宾语从句中的 they 指 robot drivers。

sentences.sentence: As a consortium of researchers put it, 'I self-driving cars cut the roughly 40,000 annual US traffic fatalities in half, the car makers might get not 20,000 thank-you notes, but 20,000 lawsuits.'
sentences.translation: 正如一个研究联盟所说：“如果自动驾驶汽车把美国每年约4万起交通死亡人数减半，汽车制造商得到的可能不是2万封感谢信，而是2万份诉讼。”

structure.text: As a consortium of researchers put it
'I self-driving cars cut the roughly 40,000 annual US traffic fatalities in half
the car makers might get not 20,000 thank-you notes, but 20,000 lawsuits.'

difficult_points: As ... put it 表示正如某方所说，引出直接引语。
引语开头 I 是源文 OCR 错误，按语境应为 If；not...but... 对比感谢信与诉讼，突出法律风险。

sentences.sentence: Interestingly, Uber are now undertaking an aggressive hiring campaign for taxi drivers to meet the demand for their taxi app.
sentences.translation: 有趣的是，优步目前正大力招聘出租车司机，以满足其叫车应用带来的需求。

structure.text: are now undertaking an aggressive hiring campaign for taxi drivers
to meet the demand for their taxi app

difficult_points: Uber 在英式英语中可按集体名词使用复数谓语 are。
to meet... 是目的状语；aggressive 在此表示力度很大、积极推进，而非具有攻击性。

sentences.sentence: It seems that even Uber is less than confident that driverless taxis will soon become a reality.
sentences.translation: 看来，就连优步自己也不太相信无人驾驶出租车很快会成为现实。

structure.text: that even Uber is less than confident
that driverless taxis will soon become a reality

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，第一个 that 从句是真正主语。
第二个 that 从句说明 confident 的具体内容；less than confident 是委婉说法，实际表示不太有信心。

sentences.sentence: Whether Uber is backing a doomed campaign or instead is about to bring in a technology that will be universally greeted with positivity and acceptance depends entirely on your viewpoint.
sentences.translation: 优步究竟是在支持一场注定失败的行动，还是即将引入一项会得到普遍欢迎和接受的技术，完全取决于你的立场。

structure.text: Whether Uber is backing a doomed campaign or instead is about to bring in a technology that will be universally greeted with positivity and acceptance
that will be universally greeted with positivity and acceptance

difficult_points: Whether...or... 引导主语从句，列出对优步行动的两种相反解读。
that 从句修饰 technology；depends 的主语是前面整个 Whether 从句。

sentences.sentence: John Reynolds, a Pittsburgh taxi driver, is angry at Uber's attitude on fully automated technology.
sentences.translation: 匹兹堡出租车司机约翰·雷诺兹对优步对待全自动技术的态度感到愤怒。

structure.text: is angry at Uber's attitude on fully automated technology

difficult_points: a Pittsburgh taxi driver 是 John Reynolds 的同位语，交代他的立场来源。
be angry at 指对某事感到愤怒；on 引出优步态度所针对的议题。

sentences.sentence: 'They are completely disregarding individual livelihoods, such as mine, as well as those of big car manufacturers in the pursuit of money.
sentences.translation: “他们为了追逐金钱，完全无视个人的生计——例如我自己的生计——也无视大型汽车制造商相关人员的生计。

structure.text: as well as those of big car manufacturers

difficult_points: They 指优步等推动无人驾驶技术的一方；mine 代替 my livelihood。
those 代替 livelihoods，避免重复；in the pursuit of 表示为了追求某物。

sentences.sentence: Admittedly things change and we have to roll with the times, but there should be some safeguards in place to protect those potentially affected by the introduction of new technologies.
sentences.translation: 诚然，时代会变化，我们也必须顺应潮流，但仍应设置一些保障措施，保护那些可能受到新技术引入影响的人。

structure.text: things change and we have to roll with the times
but there should be some safeguards in place
to protect those potentially affected by the introduction of new technologies
potentially affected by the introduction of new technologies

difficult_points: Admittedly 先承认技术变化不可避免，but 再引出说话者真正强调的保护诉求。
those 指受到影响的人；affected... 是过去分词短语修饰 those。

sentences.sentence: I guess I'm biased, being a taxi driver myself, but it's difficult to see it objectively.'
sentences.translation: 我想我确实有偏向，毕竟我自己就是出租车司机，但要客观看待这件事实在很难。”

structure.text: but it's difficult to see it objectively.'

difficult_points: being... 是原因性现在分词短语，解释说话者为何承认自己有偏向。
第一个 it 是形式主语，to see it objectively 是真正主语；第二个 it 指无人驾驶技术争议。

sentences.sentence: Susie Greenacre, a redident of Pittsburgh, has no such reservations about driverless cars.
sentences.translation: 匹兹堡居民苏茜·格里纳克对无人驾驶汽车没有这样的顾虑。

structure.text: has no such reservations about driverless cars

difficult_points: a redident... 是主语的同位语；redident 是源文拼写错误，按语境应为 resident。
such reservations 指上一段出租车司机对生计与安全的那些顾虑。

sentences.sentence: 'I'm all for it.
sentences.translation: “我完全支持它。
difficult_points: it 指无人驾驶汽车这一技术和推广主张。
be all for 是口语固定表达，表示完全赞成，并非“为了它”。

sentences.sentence: Driverless cars have my backing, any day!
sentences.translation: 无论什么时候，我都支持无人驾驶汽车！
difficult_points: have my backing 表示得到我的支持，backing 是名词。
any day 在此加强肯定语气，表示随时都会支持，而不是某个具体日期。

sentences.sentence: I hate the stress of rush-hour traffic| I think if I could just hop in a driverless car which would take me anywhere I wanted I would never want to drive again!'
sentences.translation: 我讨厌高峰时段交通带来的压力。我想，如果我只需跳上一辆无人驾驶汽车，它就能带我去任何想去的地方，我就再也不会想自己开车了！”

structure.text: I hate the stress of rush-hour traffic
if I could just hop in a driverless car which would take me anywhere I wanted
which would take me anywhere I wanted
I would never want to drive again!'

difficult_points: traffic 后的竖线是源文异常分隔符，语义上相当于句号，原句按源文保留。
if 从句与 would 主句构成假设；which 修饰 driverless car，anywhere 后省略关系副词 where。

sentences.sentence: Jason Steiner, a school teacher in a Pittsburgh secondary school, is inclined to agree with Susie.'Whilst I'm not averse to driving, I would swap the stressful daily commute by car to a driverless one if I had the chance!
sentences.translation: 匹兹堡一所中学的教师杰森·斯坦纳倾向于赞同苏茜的看法。“虽然我并不排斥开车，但如果有机会，我愿意把充满压力的每日驾车通勤换成无人驾驶出行！”

structure.text: a school teacher in a Pittsburgh secondary school
is inclined to agree with Susie
I would swap the stressful daily commute by car to a driverless one

difficult_points: 源文在 Susie. 与引语 'Whilst 之间缺少空格；为保证原文完整复现，此处作为同一分析块保留。
Whilst 引导让步从句；one 代替 commute，if 从句表达假设条件。

sentences.sentence: It just takes the pressure off driving.
sentences.translation: 它就是能减轻驾驶的压力。

structure.text: just takes the pressure off driving

difficult_points: It 指改用无人驾驶汽车出行这件事。
take the pressure off 表示减轻某人或某事承受的压力。

sentences.sentence: I would be slightly wary though, of completely dependent on a robot-driven car when it comes to having to react to unexpected obstacles in the road.'
sentences.translation: 不过，说到必须应对道路上的意外障碍时，我还是会有些担心完全依赖机器人驾驶的汽车。”

structure.text: of completely dependent on a robot-driven car
when it comes to having to react to unexpected obstacles in the road

difficult_points: of completely dependent 是源文语法异常，按语境应为 of being completely dependent，原句按源文保留。
when it comes to 后接动名词，表示谈到某种情形；having to react 表示不得不作出反应。
